subcodes.first_line: O My Name! This is the Day of victory, and by My Life, all the sublime realities and the spirits of the near ones that circle round [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسم من الیوم یوم نصرت است و نفسی الحق جمیع حقایق عالین و ارواح مقربین که طائف
subcodes.subjects: @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @nearness and remoteness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @station of the Manifestation of God
